rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a new survey method (PRT) for sensitive-question prevalence estimation, with Dutch/U.S./U.K. survey studies, while the cited paper is a U.S. quasi-experimental DTCA-to-birth-rates analysis (DMA-border design); this indicates topic overlap (ED drugs) but not clear methodological/theoretical dependence. The matched evidence is only a single DOI reference with no contextual text showing direct use as a method source, benchmark, or central comparison, so it appears likely to be background/domain motivation only.
